target.title: fix(memory-wiki): accept apply op aliases
target.body:
Summary
- Fixes #90303.
- Accept CLI-style `wiki_apply` op aliases (`synthesis`, `metadata`) alongside the internal names (`create_synthesis`, `update_metadata`).
- Normalize aliases before mutation validation so `synthesis` follows the synthesis path and `metadata` follows the metadata path.
- Add focused regression tests for both aliases.
- Review update: widen the raw input op type before alias comparison so strict extension typecheck accepts the comparisons while the normalizer still returns internal ops only.

Behavior Proof

Before this patch, the `wiki_apply` schema only accepted `create_synthesis` and `update_metadata`, so an agent call such as `{"op":"synthesis","title":"Test Synthesis","body":"Some body text","sourceIds":["sources/example.md"]}` failed schema validation with `ValidationError: op must be equal to constant`.

After this patch, I exercised the real `wiki_apply` tool implementation from this branch against a temporary memory-wiki vault. The proof script called the actual tool with `op: "synthesis"` and then `op: "metadata"`; the output shows both aliases accepted and normalized to the internal operations:

```json
{
  "rootDir": "/var/folders/zt/6txd70rn1wn9x37_3hkv_ft80000gn/T/openclaw-wiki-alias-proof-VCVTp2",
  "synthesisText": "Updated syntheses/alias-proof.md via create_synthesis. Refreshed 4 index files.",
  "synthesisOperation": "create_synthesis",
  "synthesisPagePath": "syntheses/alias-proof.md",
  "metadataText": "Updated syntheses/alias-proof.md via update_metadata. Refreshed 1 index file.",
  "metadataOperation": "update_metadata",
  "metadataPagePath": "syntheses/alias-proof.md"
}
```

Verification
- `pnpm test extensions/memory-wiki/src/apply.test.ts`
  - `Test Files  1 passed (1)`
  - `Tests  6 passed (6)`
- `pnpm lint --threads=8`
  - `oxlint:core` finished
  - `oxlint:extensions` finished
  - `oxlint:scripts` finished
- `pnpm tsgo:extensions`
  - passed
- `pnpm tsgo:extensions:test`
  - passed
- `pnpm exec tsx /private/tmp/openclaw-wiki-apply-alias-proof.ts`
  - produced the real tool output shown above

Platform Tested
- macOS arm64, pnpm v11.2.2

Limitations
- The real behavior proof uses a temporary local memory-wiki vault rather than a long-lived user vault. It exercises the actual `wiki_apply` tool implementation and filesystem-backed mutation path from this branch.
target.author: sahibzada-allahyar

target.title: refactor: remove Feishu runtime dedupe JSON fallback
target.body:
## Summary

- remove Feishu runtime reads from legacy `feishu/dedup/*.json` files
- keep dedupe runtime canonical on plugin SQLite state only
- preserve legacy JSON import in the existing doctor/setup migration detector

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/feishu/src/dedup.test.ts extensions/feishu/src/dedup-migrations.test.ts`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` - clean, no accepted/actionable findings

## Notes

This is cache/dedupe state with a 24h TTL. Existing legacy JSON import remains in the doctor migration detector; runtime no longer lazy-imports or falls back to legacy files.
